childNodes.textContent: Browser URL, title, selected elements, and source hints stay attached to the annotation handoff.

attributes.class: grid gap-4 rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/80 p-6 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)] backdrop-blur
inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] bg-surface-subtle/80 text-muted-foreground

childNodes.textContent: Extra depth in the page so the overlay capture can scroll while the fixed devtools chrome stays in place.
Certificates, host reservations, and health-gated route exposure now settle before the routed hostname flips live.
Selected UI evidence, page metadata, and agent handoff notes now survive the same browser workflow without copying state elsewhere.
Neovim and agent sessions stay attached to the inspection loop so the route, source file, and terminal surface remain connected.
Injected devtools styling stays encapsulated while the host page continues to render its own typography, spacing, and layout rules.

attributes.class: grid gap-4 rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/80 p-6 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)] backdrop-blur

childNodes.textContent: This long-form area helps the replay show real document scrolling while the overlay remains docked to the browser edge.

attributes.class: rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/70 p-5 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]

childNodes.textContent: Keep the final replay grounded in a real local domain instead of a raw localhost port so the overlay feels connected to an actual app.

attributes.class: rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/70 p-5 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]

childNodes.textContent: Annotation markers preserve their nearest React source hints when the host app exposes that metadata in development builds.

attributes.class: rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/70 p-5 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]

childNodes.textContent: Expanded editor sessions can be minimized into the tray and restored later without dropping the browser-side workflow context.

attributes.class: rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/70 p-5 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]

childNodes.textContent: The service panel and log minimap tell the same story as the host page state while the route waits behind the health gate.

attributes.class: grid gap-4 rounded-3xl border border-border-subtle bg-card/80 p-6 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)] backdrop-blur

childNodes.textContent: Purpose-built notes that keep the page tall enough for consistent overlay and minimap captures.

attributes.class: rounded-2xl border border-border-subtle bg-surface-subtle/70 p-4 text-sm leading-7 text-muted-foreground

childNodes.textContent: Keep the viewport fixed, the theme stable, and the host data deterministic so replay diffs mostly reflect the devtools UI itself.

attributes.class: rounded-2xl border border-border-subtle bg-surface-subtle/70 p-4 text-sm leading-7 text-muted-foreground

childNodes.textContent: Drive cursor motion semantically from stable targets. Layout shifts should not require hand-rebuilding the recording path.

attributes.class: rounded-2xl border border-border-subtle bg-surface-subtle/70 p-4 text-sm leading-7 text-muted-foreground

childNodes.textContent: Regenerate rrweb JSONs whenever the overlay visuals or browser workflow meaningfully change. The replays are generated artifacts, not source truth.

attributes.class: rounded-2xl border border-border-subtle bg-surface-subtle/70 p-4 text-sm leading-7 text-muted-foreground

childNodes.textContent: Leave the final visual state on screen long enough for the replay tabs in the marketing page to communicate the outcome without narration.

attributes._cssText: :host { color: initial; }
*, ::before, ::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
button { font: inherit; }
input { font: inherit; }
textarea { font: inherit; }

.devhost-1jn1f4q:hover { color: rgb(122, 162, 247); }
.devhost-1jn1f4q:focus-visible { background: rgb(46, 60, 100); color: rgb(122, 162, 247); }
.devhost-h1o6ih { color: rgb(192, 202, 245); -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex-grow: 1; font-size: 12px; min-width: 0px; overflow: hidden; text-align: left; text-overflow: clip; white-space: nowrap; }
.devhost-exd1zr { -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 8px; }

.devhost-zgt2xd { -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; background: transparent; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: 4px; color: rgb(192, 202, 245); cursor: pointer; display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0.7; padding: 2px; transition: opacity 150ms, background 150ms, color 150ms; }
.devhost-zgt2xd:hover { background: rgb(46, 60, 100); color: rgb(192, 202, 245); opacity: 1; }
.devhost-zgt2xd:active { opacity: 0.8; }
.devhost-zgt2xd:focus-visible { opacity: 1; }

.devhost-nbm86w { background: rgb(115, 218, 202); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: rgba(115, 218, 202, 0.34) 0px 0px 10px, rgba(115, 218, 202, 0.34) 0px 0px 4px; flex-shrink: 0; height: 8px; width: 8px; }
